name: mzTab-M 2.1.0-M Default Profile
description: mzTab-M Default Profile is used  for checking minimum valid mzTab-M files

requirements.description: Verifies that smallMoleculeSummary and smallMoleculeEvidence rows define the same number of abundance_assay values as assays declared in metadata.

options.2: Only different evidence streams for the same molecule with no ambiguity
options.3: Both ambiguous identification and multiple evidence streams
